text:
is a best album for the Attack on Titan anime. It was composed and written by singer/songwriter Revo of . It was released on August 7th, 2024. The regular edition contains sixteen songs; the limited edition has sixteen songs, a sound effect, and a bonus track.

Production staff

All music was written, composed, arranged and produced by Revo
Executive Producers: Koji Takahashi, Kazuo Ishikawa
Recording Engineers: Suminobu Hamada, Akihiro Tabuchi
Mixing Engineer: Suminobu Hamada
Mastering Engineer: Yasuji Yasman Maeda
Sound Effects Editor: Hirokazu Ebisu
Computer Programmer: Revo

Trivia

The regular edition's cover was drawn by Hajime Isayama.
Songs excluded from this album were Nikagetsu-go no Kimi e, Guren no Zahyou, Jiyuu no Daishou, and all bonus tracks from Linked Horizon's past albums and singles for Attack on Titan.
This is Linked Horizon's final album for Attack on Titan.
